title: The Big Cheese Ultra Power All-Weather Metal Bait Station, Reusable, Lockable, Durable, Tamper Resistant, Indoor and Outdoor Use
features: TAMPER-RESISTANT: The lockable lid design protects children and pets from contact with bait and the station includes ground anchors to ensure it is tightly fixed
WEATHER-PROOF: The metal material is durable and is suitable to place in indoor areas such as kitchen cupboards, sheds, garages and outdoor areas all year round
UNIVERSAL: Can be used with a variety of baits from The Big Cheese range (sold separately)
TESTED AND PROVEN: On-pack guarantee provided
POWERFUL: For big rodent problems, like the professionals use
description: From the manufacturer GUARANTEED EFFECTIVE RODENT CONTROL FOR BIG PEST PROBLEMS Bait & Kill: Our Ultra Power range offers the only true single-feed rodent poison available on the amateur market. The highly palatable formula contains a powerful active ingredient that delivers a lethal dose to rodents in just one feed. Catch & Kill: We offer a selection of versatile rodent trap solutions that are highly effective, with satisfaction guaranteed. Our powerful snap traps have been designed with durability in mind to be used again and again, whilst our innovative electronic products use smart-circuit technology to deliver a quick and humane kill. Pet-safe and child-safe options are available. Catch Alive: Safe for use around children and pets, these traps provide a humane, welfare-friendly alternative to lethal methods. Our professional-quality traps have been designed with safety in mind, both for the user and the target pest. Self-setting multi-catch mechanisms and fast-action closures allow for efficient rodent trapping and are ideal for large rodent infestations. Repel: 24/7 protection and peace of mind - our advanced mega-sonic repellers will protect your home around the clock, ridding your home of rodent pests and preventing their return. Poison-free and safe for use around children. Single pack POWERFUL RODENT CONTROL Our ULTRA POWER Block Bait contains the most powerful poison available on the amateur market and KILLS RATS & MICE IN ONE FEED. With single-feed bait technology just like the professionals use, our Ultra Power range delivers high-performance rodent control with satisfaction guaranteed. Single-feed bait technology Professional-quality products you can trust Experts in rodent control for over 25 years All-Weather Bait Station from The Big Cheese Ultra Power Tamper-proof bait station with lockable lid. The Ultra Power All-Weather Bait Station from The Big Cheese provides a secure and tamper-resistant housing for rodenticides, required by law when baiting rats and mice - and just like the professionals use. The bait station has been developed for use with any type of bait in outdoor locations and comes with 4 galvanised metal ground pegs provided for safe and secure placement. For complete control in wet conditions we recommend using All-Weather Block Bait from The Big Cheese. Tamper-resistant bait station with lockable lid. Protects children and pets from contact with bait. Universal – suitable for use with all baits. Includes ground anchors. Part of the Ultra Power range of products. Tamper-proof The Ultra Power All-Weather Bait Station provides a secure and tamper resistant housing for rodenticides which is required by law when baiting rats and mice. Heavy duty Designed for use indoors or outdoors. When in use, always secure the bait station so that it cannot be removed. Includes 4 x galvanised metal ground pegs for outdoors. Multiple Baiting The bait station has been developed for use with all types of bait. For complete control in wet conditions we recommend using All-Weather Block Bait from The Big Cheese. Don't forget your bait station It is a legal requirement to use a bait station when baiting mice and rats. The Big Cheese Ultra Power All-Weather Bait Station is a durable, tamper-resistant bait station with lockable lid which helps protect children, birds and non-target animals from contact with bait. Suitable for use with all baits, the station is designed for both indoor and outdoor use. Prior to treatment: Remove all known sources of food from the infested area. Treatment: Place your chosen bait inside the bait station, lock and place where there are signs of rodent activity (fresh droppings, nests or burrows, runways and feeding places). Secure bait station in place with the ground anchors provided and keep the key in a safe place away from the bait station when in use. Disposal of rodents: Rodents should be double-bagged using plastic bags and either disposed of in a household waste bin with a secure lid to prevent access of wildlife or pets, collected by a specialist waste contractor, or the local authority.
